Camille.trading_pattern: Camille's E hookshot is unpredictable. Her R true damage execution is devastating. You can't fight her all-ins early.
Camille.ability_to_dodge: Her E hookshot — move sideways or backwards when she charges. She stuns if she catches you.
Camille.early_game: Camille's all-in is oppressive. Play safe and minimize extended trades.
Camille.mid_game: Her R execute is dangerous. Your tankiness helps. Teamfight instead of dueling.
Camille.late_game: She outscales as an execute carry. You're a tank. Stick to grouped fights.
Camille.win_condition: Survive early. Build tankiness. Protect your team from her R.
Camille.scaling: Camille outscales as an execute carry. You're a tank.
Camille.positioning: Stay away from walls for E hookshot. Don't extend alone.

Ambessa.trading_pattern: Ambessa's Q poke and E engage are strong. Her ult execute is devastating. You can't fight her all-ins early.
Ambessa.ability_to_dodge: Her E charge — move sideways to avoid. It locks you into her combo range.
Ambessa.early_game: Ambessa's engage is strong. Play safe and minimize extended trades.
Ambessa.mid_game: Her ult execute is dangerous. Your tankiness helps. Teamfight instead of dueling.
Ambessa.late_game: She outscales through ult utility. You're a tank. Stick to grouped fights.
Ambessa.win_condition: Survive early. Build tankiness. Protect your team.
Ambessa.scaling: Ambessa outscales through ult utility. You're a tank.
Ambessa.positioning: Move sideways to avoid her E. Don't extend alone.

Mordekaiser.trading_pattern: Mordekaiser has higher burst at level 3+. His E pull is strong. Your tankiness helps survive.
Mordekaiser.ability_to_dodge: His E pull — move perpendicular when he casts. Stay at range to minimize risk.
Mordekaiser.early_game: Mordekaiser outbursts you early. Play safe and minimize trades.
Mordekaiser.mid_game: Your tankiness helps. His ult is dangerous grouped. Teamfight instead of dueling.
Mordekaiser.late_game: He outscales through ult utility. You're a tank. Stick to grouped fights.
Mordekaiser.win_condition: Survive early. Build tankiness. Protect your team.
Mordekaiser.scaling: Mordekaiser outscales through ult. You're a tank.
Mordekaiser.positioning: Stay at range to avoid E pull. Don't extend alone.

Gnar.trading_pattern: Gnar mini-form pokes early. Mega all-in is oppressive. Your tankiness helps survive.
Gnar.ability_to_dodge: His mega transformation — brace for impact. His R knockback is strong.
Gnar.early_game: Gnar pokes and transforms. Play safe around his transformation timer.
Gnar.mid_game: Your tankiness helps survive his burst. Teamfight instead of dueling.
Gnar.late_game: He outscales as a teamfighter. You're a tank. Stick to grouped fights.
Gnar.win_condition: Survive early. Build tankiness. Teamfight grouped.
Gnar.scaling: Gnar outscales as a teamfighter. You're a tank.
Gnar.positioning: Target him when mini. Avoid when mega. Build tankiness.

Urgot.trading_pattern: Urgot's W auto attacks and E fear dominate early. His poke is safe from range.
Urgot.ability_to_dodge: His E fear + grab — move sideways to avoid. If grabbed, you're pulled and destroyed.
Urgot.early_game: Urgot's poke is strong. Play safe and minimize extended trades.
Urgot.mid_game: His R execute scales. Your tankiness helps survive. Teamfight instead of dueling.
Urgot.late_game: He outscales through R execute. You're a tank. Stick to grouped fights.
Urgot.win_condition: Survive early. Build tankiness. Protect your team.
Urgot.scaling: Urgot outscales through R execute. You're a tank.
Urgot.positioning: Stay away from walls to avoid E grab. Don't extend alone.

Yasuo.trading_pattern: Yasuo dashes through minions with E to harass. His windwall blocks your damage.
Yasuo.ability_to_dodge: His E-Q combo chain — move away from minions. Windwall blocks W projectiles.
Yasuo.early_game: Yasuo harasses constantly. Play safe and minimize extended trades.
Yasuo.mid_game: Your tankiness helps survive. His split push is relevant. Teamfight grouped.
Yasuo.late_game: He outscales as a split pusher. You're a tank. Stick to grouped fights.
Yasuo.win_condition: Survive early. Build tankiness. Teamfight grouped.
Yasuo.scaling: Yasuo outscales as a split pusher. You're a tank.
Yasuo.positioning: Stay away from minions to prevent E dashes. Build tankiness.

Gwen.trading_pattern: Gwen has short range but high burst. Your tankiness helps survive her combos.
Gwen.ability_to_dodge: Her E snip — move sideways to dodge. She locks you into a small zone.
Gwen.early_game: Gwen's burst is strong early. Play safe and minimize extended trades.
Gwen.mid_game: Your tankiness helps survive. Her items help scale. Teamfight grouped.
Gwen.late_game: She outscales as a split pusher. You're a tank. Stick to grouped fights.
Gwen.win_condition: Survive early. Build tankiness. Teamfight grouped.
Gwen.scaling: Gwen outscales as a split pusher. You're a tank.
Gwen.positioning: Avoid her snip zone. Build tankiness. Stay grouped.

Kayle.trading_pattern: Kayle farms early with Q. She's weak to all-ins. Your all-in is strong.
Kayle.ability_to_dodge: Her W healing — focus her down before she heals. Her range increases with levels.
Kayle.early_game: Kayle is weak early. All-in hard at level 2-3. You should get kills.
Kayle.mid_game: She scales with items. Your tankiness helps. Teamfight grouped.
Kayle.late_game: She outscales dramatically. You're a tank. Stick to grouped fights.
Kayle.win_condition: Kill her early. All-in at level 1-3. Roam and group.
Kayle.scaling: Kayle outscales dramatically. You must win early.
Kayle.positioning: Rush her early to all-in. Don't let her scale.

Malphite.trading_pattern: Malphite is tanky but low damage. Your all-in is strong. All-in at level 2-3.
Malphite.ability_to_dodge: His E shockwave — move away. It reduces armor but doesn't prevent your all-in.
Malphite.early_game: Malphite is weak early. All-in hard at level 2-3.
Malphite.mid_game: Your tankiness helps. His R engage is powerful. Teamfight grouped.
Malphite.late_game: He outscales as a tank. You're equal. Stick to grouped fights.

Malphite.scaling: Malphite outscales as a tank. You must win early.
Malphite.positioning: Rush him early to all-in. Don't let him scale.

Ornn.trading_pattern: Ornn is tanky but slow. Your all-in is strong. All-in at level 2-3.
Ornn.ability_to_dodge: His R volcanic rupture — move sideways. It doesn't prevent your all-in.
Ornn.early_game: Ornn is weak early. All-in hard at level 2-3.
Ornn.mid_game: Your tankiness helps. His upgrades help scale. Teamfight grouped.
Ornn.late_game: He outscales as a tank. You're equal. Stick to grouped fights.

Darius.trading_pattern: Darius Q outer ring applies bleed. Extended trades favor him. Your all-in is strong.
Darius.ability_to_dodge: His Q bleed — walk at him to avoid outer ring. Your W tankiness helps.
Darius.early_game: Trade hard at level 2-3. All-in when his Q is down.
Darius.mid_game: Your tankiness helps survive. His ult is dangerous. Teamfight grouped.
Darius.late_game: He outscales through ult utility. You're a tank. Stick to grouped fights.
Darius.win_condition: Get a lead early. Trade hard. Teamfight grouped.
Darius.scaling: Darius outscales through ult. You're early-game focused.
Darius.positioning: Walk at him to avoid Q outer ring. Trade when Q is down.

Garen.trading_pattern: Garen Q silence doesn't affect W. His Judgment is oppressive. Your tankiness helps.
Garen.ability_to_dodge: His Q silence — when he winds up, back away. Your W still works without abilities.
Garen.early_game: Trade hard at level 2-3. Your all-in matches his.
Garen.mid_game: Your tankiness helps survive. His tankiness scales. Teamfight grouped.
Garen.late_game: He outscales as a tank. You're equal. Stick to grouped fights.
Garen.win_condition: Get a lead early. Trade hard. Teamfight grouped.
Garen.positioning: Back away when he winds up Q. Trade hard when Q is down.

Aatrox.trading_pattern: Aatrox Q swings deal high damage and heal him. Your all-in is strong when Q is down.
Aatrox.ability_to_dodge: His Q swings — dodge by moving perpendicular. Avoid standing in swings.
Aatrox.early_game: Trade hard when his Q is down. Your all-in is strong.
Aatrox.mid_game: Your tankiness helps survive. His healing is strong. Teamfight grouped.
Aatrox.late_game: He outscales through items. You're equal. Stick to grouped fights.
Aatrox.win_condition: Get a lead early. Trade when Q is down. Teamfight grouped.
Aatrox.positioning: Dodge his Q by moving sideways. Trade when Q is down.

Teemo.trading_pattern: Teemo pokes safely from range with Q. Your all-in is strong but hard to execute early.
Teemo.ability_to_dodge: His Q blind — move unpredictably. When blinded, you can't all-in.
Teemo.early_game: Teemo pokes safely. Your all-in is strong but risky. Look for kill windows.
Teemo.mid_game: Your tankiness helps survive. His shrooms are annoying. Teamfight grouped.
Teemo.late_game: He splits and shrooms. You're a tank. Stick to grouped fights.
Teemo.win_condition: Look for early kill windows. Teamfight grouped. Avoid shrooms.
Teemo.scaling: You outscale through tankiness. Teemo through shrooms.
Teemo.positioning: Rush him early to all-in. Avoid shrooms.

Vayne.trading_pattern: Vayne's range and tumble let her kite. Your tankiness helps survive. All-in when possible.

Vayne.early_game: Vayne is weak early. All-in hard at level 2-3.
Vayne.mid_game: She scales with items. Your tankiness helps. Teamfight grouped.
Vayne.late_game: She outscales as a hypercarry. You're a tank. Stick to grouped fights.

Trundle.mid_game: Your tankiness helps survive. His tankiness scales. Teamfight grouped.

Sion.ability_to_dodge: His Q poke — move left or right to dodge. Back away from charge.
Sion.early_game: All-in hard at level 2-3. Trade when possible.
